Overview  Package  Class   Use  Tree  Deprecated  Index  Help 
 PREV   NEXT FRAMES    NO FRAMES    

Uses of Package
javax.media.mscontrol.resource

Packages that use javax.media.mscontrol.resource
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common Manage resources that can be inserted in different ResourceContainers like MediaGroups, NetworkConnections or MixerAdapters. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video Capabilites to handle video resources, layout and rendering. 
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.resource used by javax.media.mscontrol
Action
          An Action defines a specific operation on a Resource, like Player.STOP.
ResourceContainer
          Gathers the set of methods to control a container of media Resources.
Trigger
          A Trigger is a condition that can be used to build an RTC.
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.resource used by javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
Action
          An Action defines a specific operation on a Resource, like Player.STOP.
AllocationEventNotifier
          Characteristics of objects able to send AllocationEvent's.
Resource
          Interface for things common to Resources.
ResourceContainer
          Gathers the set of methods to control a container of media Resources.
ResourceEvent
          A Resource sends a ResourceEvent to notify the application.
RTC
          An RTC (Run Time Control) object associates a Trigger condition with some Action.
Trigger
          A Trigger is a condition that can be used to build an RTC.
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.resource used by javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
Action
          An Action defines a specific operation on a Resource, like Player.STOP.
Resource
          Interface for things common to Resources.
ResourceEvent
          A Resource sends a ResourceEvent to notify the application.
RTC
          An RTC (Run Time Control) object associates a Trigger condition with some Action.
Trigger
          A Trigger is a condition that can be used to build an RTC.

AllocationEventNotifier
          Characteristics of objects able to send AllocationEvent's.
ResourceContainer
          Gathers the set of methods to control a container of media Resources.
ResourceEvent
          A Resource sends a ResourceEvent to notify the application.
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.resource used by javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
AllocationEventNotifier
          Characteristics of objects able to send AllocationEvent's.
Resource
          Interface for things common to Resources.
ResourceContainer
          Gathers the set of methods to control a container of media Resources.
ResourceEvent
          A Resource sends a ResourceEvent to notify the application.
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.resource used by javax.media.mscontrol.resource
Action
          An Action defines a specific operation on a Resource, like Player.STOP.
AllocationEvent
          This event is sent when ResourceContainer.confirm() completes.
AllocationEventListener
          An application must register an AllocationEventListener to be notified of a ResourceContainer.confirm() completion.
AllocationEventNotifier
          Characteristics of objects able to send AllocationEvent's.
ResourceContainer
          Gathers the set of methods to control a container of media Resources.
RTC
          An RTC (Run Time Control) object associates a Trigger condition with some Action.
Trigger
          A Trigger is a condition that can be used to build an RTC.
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.resource used by javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common
Action
          An Action defines a specific operation on a Resource, like Player.STOP.
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.resource used by javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video
Resource
          Interface for things common to Resources.
ResourceEvent
          A Resource sends a ResourceEvent to notify the application.
